grant_title: Delaware Division of the Arts Stretch Pool Grants 2026
project_area: Arts and culture, donor engagement, fundraising
demographic_requirements: None specified; open to Delaware arts nonprofits receiving general operating support funding from DDOA in FY26
eligibility_summary: Arts nonprofits in Delaware that currently receive general operating support funding from the Delaware Division of the Arts (DDOA) in FY26 are eligible. Eligibility is divided into three tiers based on operating budget size: Large ($1.8M+), Medium ($150K-$1.799M), and Small ($1-$149,999).
